title: NEIKO 01148A Hex Allen Power Bit Set, 11-Piece Metric Sizes 1.5mm to 8mm | Magnetic Hex Head Bits | 3 Quick Release Shanks | Premium S2 Steel | Compatible with Power Drills and Impact Drivers
features: [QUALITY]: Corrosion Resistant Black Phosphate Coating and High Quality S2 Steel for max durability.
[VERSATILE]: Multiple hex head sizes ensure that you have the right fitting drill bit for any job.
[CONVENIENT]: Secure bit holder for easy storage and portability for on-the-go convenience.
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: The Neiko 01148A Magnetized Hex Head Bit Set conveniently comes with 11 pieces of various Metric sizes to make sure that you have the perfect fit for all types of jobs - whether its furniture building, industrial work, or DIY projects, this hex screwdriver bit set is sure to have what you need.Theres no more need to waste time twisting and turning with a mini Allen wrench or key. Every hex head drill bit has a Quick Release Shank for easy drilling with hand tools and power drills.To ensure maximum durability and longevity, each hex driver bit is constructed of High Quality S2 Steel and coated in Corrosion Resistant Black Phosphate. Also, Laser Etched bit sizes makes each piece easily recognizable while the set is securely held with the Bit Holder when not in use.Sizes included are: 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4, 5, 5.5, 6, 7, 8 millimeters

specifications_table.Compatible fastener range: ‎Hex head screws and bolts, sizes 1.5mm to 8mm
